generated_comment: Yaar, yeh ladkiyan bhi na... us bande ki gharwali aur bachche the, usne sab jaante hue bhi uska ghar ujaad diya. Aadmi toh bechara mood-mood mein phass jaata hai, par is ladki ne hadd kar di.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment blames the female party for 'breaking' a family ('uska ghar ujaad diya') while simultaneously excusing the man's actions by portraying him as a helpless victim who 'gets trapped in the spur of the moment' ('mood-mood mein phass jaata hai'), thus demonstrating clear blame asymmetry and homewrecker framing.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Gaurav. Age 28. A Jat man from Haryana working as a constable in the Delhi Police. You are in the police station common room with three male colleagues during a slow night shift. You are talking about a female officer who has just been posted to your station. One colleague asks what she is like to work with. You are giving your honest assessment.
